title: CT8 static tactic graph — Finite-state pumping
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT8 (Finite-state pumping). It requires the complete 18-node array in fixed source order from CT8.N01 through CT8.N18, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT8 (Finite-state pumping) tactic specification; must equal "CT8".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N01, "Definition — bounded-width sequence S_0,,S_m", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N01, "Definition — bounded-width sequence S_0,,S_m"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N01, "Definition — bounded-width sequence S_0,,S_m"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N02, "Definition — finite label or exact external type tau(S_i)", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N02, "Definition — finite label or exact external type tau(S_i)"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N02, "Definition — finite label or exact external type tau(S_i)"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N03, "Scope candidate — no finite type space — scope audit", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N03, "Scope candidate — no finite type space — scope audit"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N03, "Scope candidate — no finite type space — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N04, "Payload record — P_8→10: label space too coarse", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N04, "Payload record — P_8→10: label space too coarse"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N04, "Payload record — P_8→10: label space too coarse"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N05, "Payload lemma — P_8→10 satisfies CT10 trigger", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N05, "Payload lemma — P_8→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N05, "Payload lemma — P_8→10 satisfies CT10 trigger"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N06, "CT 10 — refinement", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N06, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N06, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N07, "Pigeonhole lemma — does an exact type repeat?", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N07, "Pigeonhole lemma — does an exact type repeat?"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N07, "Pigeonhole lemma — does an exact type repeat?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N08, "Lemma — finite-threshold certificate", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N08, "Lemma — finite-threshold certificate"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N08, "Lemma — finite-threshold certificate"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N09, "C5 — finite enumeration", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N09, "C5 — finite enumeration"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N09, "C5 — finite enumeration"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N10, "Dichotomy lemma — are repeated states equal in all contexts?"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N10, "Dichotomy lemma — are repeated states equal in all contexts?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT8.N11, "Lemma — separating-context trigger", in CT8 (Finite-state pumping); must equal "CT8.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N11, "Lemma — separating-context trigger"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N11, "Lemma — separating-context trigger"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT8.N15, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal the integer 15.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N15, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT8.N17, "Lemma — repeated-type compression"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.
